title: Build a multi-agent system: A2A & Agent Registry
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to build production-ready multi-agent systems using the Agent2Agent (A2A) Protocol and Agent Registry. The tutorial covers agent discovery, communication patterns, and orchestration using Google's Agent Development Kit, with live demos of dog walker and trip planner agents.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through building production-ready multi-agent systems with the Agent2Agent (A2A) Protocol and an Agent Registry. The tutorial covers agent discovery, communication patterns, and orchestration via Google's Agent Development Kit. Live demos use dog walker and trip planner agents to show how the registry handles discovery and how A2A coordinates communication across agents.
